[vc_row full_width=”stretch_row” color_scheme=”white” css=”.vc_custom_1566364123125{background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}”][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”60px”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1566377473853{margin-bottom: 100px !important;}”][vc_column][vc_tta_tour style=”insignia_tour_layout1 title-font” shape=”square” color=”peacoc” spacing=”” active_section=”1″ el_class=”tour_vision”][vc_tta_section title=”Vision and Values” tab_id=”1566364326921-ddaba47b-1cb1″][vc_column_text]

Vision and Values

The Exoxemis technology platform has the potential to change the paradigm of infectious disease prevention and treatment by providing an alternative mechanism of action to existing antibiotics and other anti-infectives. Drug resistance poses a growing threat and there are few alternatives for the prevention of serious and resistant infections.[/vc_column_text][/vc_tta_section][vc_tta_section title=”A novel approach” tab_id=”1566364664399-cd4ae388-f416″][vc_column_text]

A novel approach

Exoxemis’ MPO system offers an alternative platform from which to build a new series of effective products based upon natural host defense mechanisms. This novel approach is effective against bacteria, viruses, fungi, molds, yeasts and spores and promises to both prevent and treat infection without promoting resistance.[/vc_column_text][/vc_tta_section][vc_tta_section title=”A unique mechanism of action” tab_id=”1566364663611-8fe56879-a7b4″][vc_column_text]

A unique mechanism of action

The MPO and EPO enzymes work by generating singlet oxygen as the active microbicidal agent. These enzymes bind selectively to the cell membranes of disease-causing organisms minimizing collateral damage to normal flora and host cells.[/vc_column_text][/vc_tta_section][vc_tta_section title=”The promise of a new paradigm” tab_id=”1566364326955-c393b47f-c530″][vc_column_text]

The promise of a new paradigm

Exoxemis proprietary technology offers the medical profession new tools to address the challenge of infection prevention and treatment.[/vc_column_text][/vc_tta_section][/vc_tta_tour][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width=”stretch_row” disable_element=”yes” css=”.vc_custom_1566369011863{background-color: #f7fbfd !important;}”][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”60px”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/6″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”2/3″]

Certificates of our Doctors

[vc_column_text]

we’re very excited about it’s potential, contact us today

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/4″ css=”.vc_custom_1543390348434{padding-top: 0px !important;}”]

Exoxemis - a biomedical research company focused on the study and commercialization of a topical biological antiseptic system utilizing Myeloperoxidase (MPO).
@graph.description: Myeloperoxidase (MPO) and eosinophil peroxidase (EPO) enzymes work to preferentially kill a broad range of pathogens through a unique mechanism of action unlikely to induce resistance.
